name: A permanent visit to space
description:
You were challenged by your friends into invading a research base with restricted access. Somehow you managed to actually do in, but were quickly caught. You woke up tied to a chair with your eyes and mouth covered with something

"It looks like you came into a place that you shouldn't. You didn't even were suposed to see what we have here. So, we have the perfect solution for it."

Soon after you fell asleep once again

Just to wake up inside a spaceship already in space
creator: Noob1337
